home.title: Kyuna / 霜花
home.subtitle: Engineer · OSS · AI comic pipelines · YouTube
home.description: Solo dev shipping UIs, APIs, and low-level toys when curiosity wins. Cosplay + community on one layer; code + visuals + story on another—anime-coded aesthetics next to boring infrastructure ✨
home.seoTitle: Kyuna (霜花) — engineer, OSS, AI comics, YouTube
home.seoDescription: Kyuna: TypeScript/JavaScript apps, Go/Rust backends, AI comic tooling, YouTube @amarihana. Portfolio at kyuna-web.vercel.app.
home.imageAlt: Kyuna — engineer, OSS, AI comics, creator
home.buildSectionAria: How I group my work: product, backend, systems, creative
home.buildTree:
./build
├── product/      # TS/JS apps → kyuna-web.vercel.app · amane312.vercel.app
├── backend/      # Go services, APIs, automation, dotfiles
├── systems/      # Rust/C — OS-adjacent toys, bootloaders, engines
└── creative/     # editors, AI comic tooling, idea → panel faster
home.bio: Hi—I'm Kyuna (霜花), based in Ulaanbaatar 🇲🇳 I ship product code, OSS, and AI comic pipelines; you’ll also find me on YouTube @amarihana and in cosplay communities when I’m not in the terminal~ ✨

timeline.2000: Born in Ulaanbaatar, Mongolia 🇲🇳 - The beginning of my adventure!
timeline.2019: Started my developer journey at Able Soft - First steps into the coding world! ✨
timeline.2021: Graduated from MUST & joined Sod Mongol LLC - Growing stronger every day! 💪
timeline.2023-01: Completed my journey at Sod Mongol LLC - Time for new adventures!
timeline.2023-02: Currently creating magic at Next Social Platform LLC 🌟

timelineDesc.2000: Beginning of my journey in Ulaanbaatar.
timelineDesc.2019: First professional role; learned how teams ship real software.
timelineDesc.2021: Deepened full-stack skills across web and mobile platforms.
timelineDesc.2023-01: Wrapped a long chapter; ready for new product challenges.
timelineDesc.2023-02: Building social and platform products with a strong UX focus.

ctaSection.heading: Fork something cool? Tell me ✨
ctaSection.body: Hiring, collabs, or OSS—small PRs with a clear why beat drive-by refactors. I like seeing forks in the wild.
ctaSection.socialHint: Or find me on social media ♡
